blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,912 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
